files_modified.change_summary: Changed agents.model from 'anthropic/claude-opus' to 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4' and agents.provider from 'openrouter' to 'anthropic'. Added a comment noting Opus bridge remains available as an alternative. Updated the comment on the model line to indicate it uses the built-in anti gravity default.

Replaced OPENROUTER_API_KEY with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as the primary key. Added OPENROUTER_API_KEY as an optional override for users who want to use the Opus bridge via OpenRouter instead of the default anti gravity models.
